reforms.description: A new Patent Law will be adopted to provide stronger support for high value-added activities, aiming to enhance innovation and protect intellectual property rights.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Strengthening intellectual property rights encourages innovation and investment in high value-added sectors, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: A new Patent Law giving stronger support to high value-added activities will be adopted.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant change in the legal framework for intellectual property, which is crucial for fostering innovation and attracting investment.
reforms.source_quote: A new Patent Law giving stronger support to high value-added activities will be adopted.

reforms.description: A 'Digital Turkey' masterplan will be prepared to enhance the digital infrastructure and promote the use of technology across various sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital infrastructure is essential for enhancing productivity, innovation, and competitiveness in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: A 'Digital Turkey' masterplan will be prepared.
reforms.importance_rationale: The masterplan represents a significant initiative to enhance the digital landscape, which is crucial for modernizing the economy and fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A 'Digital Turkey' masterplan will be prepared.

reforms.description: Turkey aims to raise R&D spending, which has increased over the past decade but still falls short of the government's long-term targets. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to enhance the policy framework for innovation and experimentation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing R&D spending is expected to boost innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has set targets for R&D spending as part of its long-term strategy.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses a critical area for enhancing Turkey's innovation capacity, although it is part of a broader set of initiatives.
reforms.source_quote: Raise R&D spending, which has increased over the past decade but falls short of the government’s own longer-term targets.

reforms.description: The new government declared its commitment to implement the reforms outlined in the 2016 Action Plan, which includes measures to improve the effectiveness of publicly-funded R&D and design centers.
reforms.component_name: Publicly-funded R&D and design centers reform
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the effectiveness of R&D funding can lead to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The government stated its commitment to implement the planned measures.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform aims to improve the effectiveness of existing R&D funding mechanisms, which is significant for enhancing innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: The new government declared its continuing commitment to the reforms enshrined in the 2016 Action Plan.

reforms.description: A fund will be created to support early-stage R&D and design efforts, aimed at fostering innovation and technological development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This fund is expected to enhance R&D capabilities, leading to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund for early-stage R&D and design efforts has been included in the 2016 Action Plan.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of this fund represents a significant step towards enhancing R&D investment, which is crucial for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A fund to be created for early stage R&D and design efforts.

reforms.description: Tax incentives will be provided for expenditures related to patent applications, encouraging firms to invest in innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the costs associated with patenting, this reform is expected to stimulate innovation and enhance the competitive edge of firms.
reforms.status_evidence: Tax incentives for expenditures for patent applications have been included in the 2016 Action Plan.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly incentivizes innovation through financial support for patenting activities.
reforms.source_quote: Tax incentives to be provided for expenditures for patent applications.

reforms.description: A credit guarantee will be established to support the commercialization of innovative projects, facilitating access to financing for startups and innovative firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This measure aims to reduce the financial barriers for innovative projects, thereby promoting entrepreneurship and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: A credit guarantee to be established for the commercialization of innovative projects.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is important as it directly addresses financing challenges faced by innovative firms, enhancing their growth potential.
reforms.source_quote: A credit guarantee to be established for the commercialization of innovative projects.

reforms.description: R&D tax incentives were augmented over the past decade, contributing to an increase in R&D expenditures and employment in Turkey.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing R&D tax incentives encourages firms to invest more in research and development, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The augmentation of R&D tax incentives has been noted as contributing to increased R&D activities.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant enhancement of existing tax incentives, which is crucial for boosting R&D activities in the private sector.
reforms.source_quote: R&D tax incentives were augmented over the past decade. This contributed to the increase of R&D expenditures and R&D employment.

reforms.description: Turkey has introduced a Turkish Growth and Innovation Fund, which is a 'fund of funds' backed by the European Investment Fund, aimed at increasing access to venture capital for small and medium-sized enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance access to capital for innovative firms, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Turkish Growth and Innovation Fund has been publicly announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a significant fund to support venture capital represents a structural change in the financing landscape for innovative firms in Turkey.
reforms.source_quote: The Turkish Growth and Innovation Fund is a 'fund of funds' backed by the European Investment Fund, which will place at least EUR400 million in mostly foreign but also domestic funds investing in venture businesses in Turkey.

reforms.description: Turkey's R&D policies have shifted focus from national missions to diffusion-oriented objectives, aiming to enhance firms' capacity to absorb advanced technologies. An additional R&D support package introduced in early 2016 provides tax incentives for joint projects between firms and university researchers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the ability of firms to adopt new technologies, potentially leading to increased productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: An additional R&D support package was provided in early 2016.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in Turkey's R&D policy framework, focusing on enhancing the diffusion of technology and collaboration between firms and universities, which is crucial for long-term economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: In early 2016, an additional R&D support package provided tax incentives to joint projects between firms and university researchers.

reforms.description: Turkey plans to implement a state aid monitoring system by the end of 2016 to enhance the understanding of the impact of R&D and innovation policies, with regular publication of evaluation studies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving the understanding of R&D and innovation policies can lead to better-targeted support, enhancing overall productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The implementation of the state aid monitoring system is planned for the end of 2016.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant step towards improving the evaluation of R&D and innovation policies, which is crucial for effective policy-making.
reforms.source_quote: Together with the planned implementation of the state aid monitoring system from end-2016, it is expected to enhance the understanding of the impact of R&D and innovation policies.

reforms.description: The Turkish government aims to create a Productivity Council to assess structural and policy drivers of productivity growth and issue recommendations.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Establishing a dedicated council can lead to more informed policy decisions that enhance productivity, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Consider creating A Productivity Council with a broad mandate to assess all relevant structural and policy drivers of productivity growth.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a Productivity Council is a significant reform aimed at improving productivity assessment and policy recommendations, which is vital for economic development.
reforms.source_quote: Consider creating A Productivity Council with a broad mandate to assess all relevant structural and policy drivers of productivity growth in Turkey and to issue policy recommendations.

reforms.description: The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TÜBITAK) launched the Support Programme for Research, Technological Development and Innovation Projects in Priority Areas (TÜBİTAK-1003) to stimulate targeted R&D projects in specific sectors with strong capacity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By funding targeted R&D projects, the programme aims to enhance innovation capacity in key sectors, potentially leading to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme was launched to support R&D in priority areas.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant effort to direct public funding towards specific R&D areas, which can enhance innovation and competitiveness in those sectors.
reforms.source_quote: The TÜBİTAK-1003 programme seeks to stimulate target-oriented, concrete R&D projects in specific areas with strong R&D capacity.

reforms.description: The government announced a new patent law to cover costs related to patenting for SMEs, aiming to enhance intellectual property protection and encourage innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing the costs associated with patenting, the law aims to incentivize innovation among SMEs, potentially leading to increased R&D activities and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The new patent law was announced to support SMEs in patenting.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses a key barrier to innovation for SMEs by facilitating access to patent protection, which is crucial for commercializing new ideas.
reforms.source_quote: The government has announced a new patent law, which stipulates that the costs for SMEs related to patenting will be covered by the government.

reforms.description: The Turkish authorities plan to invest more in vocational training and research-and-development to enhance skills and innovation capacity in the economy.
reforms.package_name: 2016 Vocational Training and R&D Investment Initiative
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in vocational training and R&D is expected to improve the skill set of the workforce, leading to higher productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The authorities expect to enhance skills and innovation through increased investment.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant commitment to improving human capital and innovation capacity, which is crucial for economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Invest more in vocational training and research-and-development.
